title: ICMoney
description: ICMoney was built to be used solely as an economy plugin with spongeforge servers.
body:
ICMoney was built to be used solely as an economy plugin with spongeforge servers for the Intergalactic Conflict modpack.

It adds 10 new items to the game as detailed below.

Trading post's also have the ability to send items put up for sale or purchase to discord via customizable webhook integration.

**Items**
Coin's, Physical Coin's.

Gold Chip, Crafting Ingredient.

Security Wrench, Used to access secured blocks!.

Wallet, Used to store currency in one place..

**Blocks**
Bank, Collects money from all connected Trading Posts.

Network Cable, Used to connect Trading Posts to Banks within a single network..

Security Wrench, Used to access secured blocks.

Network Gate, Used to enable and disable networks branches by redstone signal..

Trading Post, Used to buy and sell blocks and items..

Market, A server-wide market that allows you to buy and sell many items.
